user.title: Google Find My Device
user.description: Choose your authentication method. Master Token is recommended - run get_token.py on your PC first to obtain it.

app_password.title: App Password Login
app_password.description: Enter your Google credentials. You need an App Password from myaccount.google.com > Security > App passwords. Warning: This method may not work for all accounts.

master_token.title: Master Token Login
master_token.description: Run the get_token.py script on your PC to obtain a master token, then paste it here. See the README for instructions.

error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check your credentials and try again.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This Google account is already configured.
